overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin in a driving simulator game, navigating through heavy rain in a European city. The bus travels along wet residential streets with active windshield wipers, stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers, and continues through intersections with other traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet residential street with oncoming traffic

events.description: windshield wipers sweep across the windshield clearing heavy rain accumulation
bus approaches an intersection with oncoming vehicle headlights visible through the rain

agents.ego_description: operating the bus through heavy rain, maintaining steady speed on the wet road surface

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights illuminated approaching in the opposite lane

entered.detail: driver's control panel with multiple digital screens, steering wheel, and instrument cluster
black wiper blades moving rhythmically across the rain-covered front windshield
rain-soaked black asphalt street reflecting the headlights of oncoming traffic
multi-story concrete residential buildings partially obscured by rain and trees
tall deciduous trees lining the right side of the street with wet foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the bus driver's perspective during a heavy downpour. The windshield wipers work continuously to clear the rain as the bus drives along a wet residential street. Oncoming traffic with headlights on approaches from the distance, while apartment buildings and trees line both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential street with parked vehicles

events.description: bus passes a yellow van parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: navigating steadily along the residential road, maneuvering past parked cars on both sides

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked along the right curb partially visible through the rain
red vehicle parked on the left side of the street

entered.detail: white four-door sedan parked parallel to the curb on the right side
wet cobblestone paved pedestrian walkway running alongside the road
bright yellow commercial van parked on the street shoulder

segments.scene_description: The bus continues driving through the rain-soaked residential neighborhood, passing parked vehicles including a white sedan and yellow van. The cobblestone sidewalk runs parallel to the road on the right, while trees and apartment buildings create a corridor effect. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm as the bus progresses down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus slows down and comes to a complete stop at the designated bus stop
camera pans right to reveal the open bus door and passengers waiting at the shelter
bus doors close and the vehicle prepares to depart from the stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at the bus stop, observing passengers boarding through the right side door

notable_agents.action: passengers wearing yellow high-visibility jackets waiting at the bus stop shelter to board

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with transparent panels and bench seating
open glass bus door with yellow safety handrails and step
red and yellow commercial advertisement poster mounted on the shelter wall

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls to a stop at a bus shelter, and the camera pans right to show the open door where passengers in yellow jackets are waiting to board. The interior dashboard shifts to the left of the frame as the view focuses on the shelter and boarding area. After a brief stop, the doors close and the bus prepares to continue its route.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approach on wet residential street

events.description: bus accelerates away from the bus stop and merges back into the traffic lane
bus approaches an intersection with a 50 km/h speed limit sign visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the bus stop and navigating through the wet intersection with oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: dark van with headlights on approaching the intersection from the opposite direction

entered.detail: circular regulatory traffic sign with red border indicating 50 km/h speed limit
white painted pedestrian crosswalk lines and lane dividers at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the stop and accelerates along the rain-slicked road, passing a 50 km/h speed limit sign as it approaches an intersection. The camera returns to the forward-facing driving position with the dashboard centered. Oncoming traffic is visible ahead as the bus continues its route through the wet urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin as it navigates a rain-drenched residential corridor. It begins amidst a heavy downpour, with windshield wipers working rhythmically to clear the glass while the bus advances toward oncoming traffic with glowing headlights. As the vehicle progresses, the view shifts to reveal a dense urban layout of apartment buildings and trees lining both sides of the wet road. The scene then glides past a series of parked vehicles, including a white sedan and a yellow van, while the camera tracks alongside a cobblestone sidewalk. Finally, the bus continues its steady movement through the rain, maintaining its course through the narrow street as the wipers continue their constant motion.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as the bus transitions from a stationary passenger pickup to active navigation through a rain-slicked city. It begins with the bus pulling to a stop at a shelter, where the camera pans right to focus on passengers in yellow jackets boarding through the open door. As the doors close, the view shifts back toward the center, with the dashboard returning to its primary position as the vehicle accelerates away from the curb. The scene then opens up onto the wet urban road, passing a 50 km/h speed limit sign while approaching a busy intersection. Finally, the camera settles into a forward-facing driving position, tracking oncoming traffic through the persistent rain.
